da.hero_subtitle: Som elev på yogalæreruddannelsen, kursist eller bundle-deltager har du adgang til vores ugentlige klasser og workshops. Her finder du skemaet og booker dine pladser.
da.intro_subtitle: Som elev på yogalæreruddannelsen, kursist eller bundle-deltager har du adgang til vores ugentlige klasser og workshops. Her finder du skemaet og booker dine pladser.
da.video_desc: Uanset om du skal opfylde dine praksistimer, booke workshops eller bare vil træne — her finder du alle tider og booker direkte.
da.card1_desc: Din uddannelse inkluderer ubegrænset klasseadgang. Book praksistimer før, under og efter dit forløb.
da.card2_desc: Book dine workshops og brug din inkluderede klasseadgang. Bundle-pakker giver en måneds ubegrænset adgang.
da.card3_desc: Hot, varm og stuetemperatur — 7 dage om ugen.
da.schedule_subtitle: Alle klasser er for alle niveauer. Drop ind, brug et klippekort, eller træn med et medlemskab. YTT-elever og kursister — din adgang er allerede aktiv.
da.app_text: Foretrækker du at booke på farten? Download vores app for den hurtigste oplevelse — se skemaet og book når som helst.
da.students_subtitle: Når du starter forberedelsesfasen for yogalæreruddannelsen eller tilmelder dig et kursus som Inversions, Backbends eller Splits — kan du begynde at booke klasser med det samme.
da.scard1_desc: Vi tilbyder klasser hele dagen, så du kan træne når det passer ind i din hverdag.
da.scard2_desc: Se dine kommende bookinger, fremmødehistorik og træningsstatistik i ét samlet overblik.
da.scard3_desc: Din bookingadgang aktiveres automatisk efter start af forberedelsesfasen eller kursustilmelding — ingen ventetid.
da.scard4_desc: Lige ved Christianshavn Metro. Parkering i sidegaderne. Omklædning og bad samt 2 yogasale — én opvarmet, én uopvarmet.
da.students_note: Spørgsmål om din bookingadgang? Kontakt os på
da.explore_lead: Hos Yoga Bible tilbyder vi forløb, der hjælper dig videre i din praksis – fra målrettede kursusforløb til fleksible læreruddannelser.
da.explore_courses_text: Vi afholder hver måned fokuserede 4-ugers forløb pakket som 8 × 90 minutters workshops (to gange om ugen) – til en rimelig pris og designet til alle, der vil fordybe deres praksis trin for trin.
da.explore_inv_blurb: Lær at arbejde sikkert med håndstande, underarmsbalancer og hovedstande – teknik, styrke og mod.
da.explore_spl_blurb: Smidighed med system – hofteåbnere, baglår og teknik til front & middle splits uden at presse kroppen.
da.explore_bb_blurb: Sunde bagoverbøjninger med fokus på åndedræt, stabilitet og gradvis mobilitet i brystryg og hofter.
da.explore_4w_text: Samme Yoga Alliance–certificerede uddannelse – komprimeret til 4 uger for dig, der vil gennemføre hurtigt og har tiden til at fordybe dig hver dag.
da.explore_4w_li1: Daglig træning og teori i et fokuseret forløb
da.explore_4w_li2: Stærkt fokus på teknik, undervisningshåndværk & praksis
da.explore_18w_text: Et komplet Yoga Alliance–certificeret forløb for dig, der bor i København og omegn og har en travl hverdag. Træn fast hver uge over 18 uger.
da.explore_18w_li1: Fleksibel struktur der passer til hverdagen
da.explore_18w_li2: Stærkt fokus på teknik, undervisningshåndværk & praksis

en.hero_subtitle: As a yoga teacher training student, course participant, or bundle member, you have access to our weekly classes and workshops. Find the schedule and book your spot here.
en.intro_subtitle: As a yoga teacher training student, course participant, or bundle member, you have access to our weekly classes and workshops. Find the schedule and book your spot here.
en.video_desc: Whether you need to complete your practice hours, book workshops, or just want to train — find all times here and book directly.
en.card1_desc: Your training includes unlimited class access. Book practice hours before, during, and after your program.
en.card2_desc: Book your workshops and use your included class access. Bundle packages include one month of unlimited access.
en.card3_desc: Hot, warm, and room temperature — 7 days a week.
en.schedule_subtitle: All classes are for all levels. Drop in, use a class card, or train with a membership. YTT students and course participants — your access is already active.
en.app_text: Prefer to book on the go? Download our app for the fastest experience — view the schedule and book anytime.
en.students_subtitle: When you start the Preparation Phase for the yoga teacher training or sign up for a course like Inversions, Backbends, or Splits — you can start booking classes right away.
en.scard1_desc: We offer classes throughout the day, so you can train when it fits your schedule.
en.scard2_desc: View your upcoming bookings, attendance history, and training statistics in one unified overview.
en.scard3_desc: Your booking access is activated automatically after starting the Preparation Phase or course registration — no waiting.
en.scard4_desc: Right by Christianshavn Metro. Side-street parking available. Changing rooms and showers plus 2 yoga studios — one heated, one unheated.
en.students_note: Questions about your booking access? Contact us at
en.explore_lead: At Yoga Bible we offer programs that help you advance in your practice — from focused course programs to flexible teacher trainings.
en.explore_courses_text: Every month we run focused 4-week programs packaged as 8 × 90-minute workshops (twice a week) — at an affordable price and designed for anyone who wants to deepen their practice step by step.
en.explore_inv_blurb: Learn to work safely with handstands, forearm balances, and headstands — technique, strength, and courage.
en.explore_spl_blurb: Flexibility with a system — hip openers, hamstrings, and technique for front & middle splits without pushing the body.
en.explore_bb_blurb: Healthy backbends with focus on breath, stability, and gradual mobility in the thoracic spine and hips.
en.explore_4w_text: The same Yoga Alliance–certified training — compressed into 4 weeks for those who want to complete quickly and have the time to immerse fully each day.
en.explore_4w_li1: Daily training and theory in a focused program
en.explore_4w_li2: Strong focus on technique, teaching craft & practice
en.explore_18w_text: A complete Yoga Alliance–certified program for those living in or near Copenhagen with a busy schedule. Train consistently every week over 18 weeks.
en.explore_18w_li1: Flexible structure that fits daily life
en.explore_18w_li2: Strong focus on technique, teaching craft & practice
